parameters.query:
WITH parametros AS (
    SELECT
        MIN(mes) AS fecha_min,
        MAX(mes) AS fecha_max
    FROM (
        SELECT date_trunc('month', fecha_dia)::date AS mes
        FROM crm.bot_leads_david
        WHERE cod_propiedad_unificado ILIKE '%MODO%'
          AND es_nuevo = 1
        UNION
        SELECT date_trunc('month', fecha_programada)::date AS mes
        FROM rentas_crm.visitas
        WHERE formulario ILIKE '%Inquilino interesado%'
          AND codigo_inmueble ILIKE '%MODO%'
    ) t
),
calendario AS (
    SELECT generate_series(fecha_min, fecha_max, interval '1 month')::date AS mes
    FROM parametros
),
leads AS (
    SELECT
        date_trunc('month', fecha_dia)::date AS mes,
        COUNT(DISTINCT telefono) AS cant_leads
    FROM crm.bot_leads_david
    WHERE cod_propiedad_unificado ILIKE '%MODO%'
      AND es_nuevo = 1
    GROUP BY 1
),
visitas AS (
    SELECT
        date_trunc('month', fecha_programada)::date AS mes,
        COUNT(DISTINCT celular) AS cant_visitas_agendadas_real,
        COUNT(
            DISTINCT CASE
                WHEN estado NOT IN ('No realizado', 'Cliente no asistió')
                THEN celular
            END
        ) AS cant_visitas_realizadas
    FROM rentas_crm.visitas
    WHERE formulario ILIKE '%Inquilino interesado%'
      AND codigo_inmueble ILIKE '%MODO%'
    GROUP BY 1
),
nuevos_ingresos_depa AS (
    SELECT DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', A.fecha_ingreso)::date AS mes, 
	COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN E.id IS NOT NULL THEN E.codigo_pago ELSE D.codigo END) AS nuevos_ingresos_depa
    FROM rentas_crm.ingresos A
    LEFT JOIN rentas_crm.concepto_ingreso B ON A.id = B.ingresos_id
    LEFT JOIN rentas_crm.contratos C ON A.contrato_id = C.id
    LEFT JOIN rentas_crm.inmuebles D ON C.inmueble_id = D.id
    LEFT JOIN rentas_crm.habitaciones E ON E.id = C.habitacion_id
    WHERE tipo = 'generado'
    AND (B.VOUCHERS ILIKE '%https%'
         OR B.observaciones IS NOT NULL
         OR A.banco_transferencia IS NOT NULL
         OR A.cuenta_transferencia IS NOT NULL)
    AND D.codigo ILIKE '%MODO%'
    GROUP BY 1
	ORDER BY 1 DESC
),
nuevos_ingresos_cochera AS (
    SELECT DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', A.fecha_ingreso)::date AS mes, 
	COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN E.id IS NOT NULL THEN E.codigo_pago ELSE D.codigo END) AS nuevos_ingresos_cochera
    FROM rentas_crm.ingresos A
    LEFT JOIN rentas_crm.concepto_ingreso B ON A.id = B.ingresos_id
    LEFT JOIN rentas_crm.contratos C ON A.contrato_id = C.id
    LEFT JOIN rentas_crm.inmuebles D ON C.inmueble_id = D.id
    LEFT JOIN rentas_crm.habitaciones E ON E.id = C.habitacion_id
    WHERE tipo = 'generado'
    AND (B.VOUCHERS ILIKE '%https%'
         OR B.observaciones IS NOT NULL
         OR A.banco_transferencia IS NOT NULL
         OR A.cuenta_transferencia IS NOT NULL)
    AND D.codigo ILIKE '%MODC%'
    GROUP BY 1
	ORDER BY 1 DESC
)
SELECT
    c.mes,
    COALESCE(l.cant_leads, 0)                                AS cant_leads_real,
    COALESCE(v.cant_visitas_agendadas_real, 0)               AS cant_visitas_agendadas_real,
    COALESCE(v.cant_visitas_realizadas, 0)                   AS cant_visitas_realizadas,
    COALESCE(i.nuevos_ingresos_depa, 0)                      AS cant_nuevos_ingresos_depa_real,
    COALESCE(h.nuevos_ingresos_cochera, 0)                   AS cant_nuevos_ingresos_cochera_real
FROM calendario c
LEFT JOIN leads l                  ON c.mes = l.mes
LEFT JOIN visitas v                ON c.mes = v.mes
LEFT JOIN nuevos_ingresos_depa i   ON c.mes = i.mes
LEFT JOIN nuevos_ingresos_cochera h ON c.mes = h.mes
WHERE c.mes >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 day'
  AND c.mes < CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY c.mes DESC;

    LEFT JOIN rentas_crm.habitaciones E ON E.id = C.habitacion_id
    WHERE tipo = 'generado'
    AND (B.VOUCHERS ILIKE '%https%'
         OR B.observaciones IS NOT NULL

         OR A.cuenta_transferencia IS NOT NULL)
    AND D.codigo ILIKE '%MODC%'
    GROUP BY 1
	ORDER BY 1 DESC

SELECT
    c.mes,

    COALESCE(v.cant_visitas_agendadas_real, 0)               AS cant_visitas_agendadas_real,
    COALESCE(v.cant_visitas_realizadas, 0)                   AS cant_visitas_realizadas,
    COALESCE(i.nuevos_ingresos_depa, 0)                      AS cant_nuevos_ingresos_depa_real,
    COALESCE(h.nuevos_ingresos_cochera, 0)                   AS cant_nuevos_ingresos_cochera_real
FROM calendario c
LEFT JOIN leads l                  ON c.mes = l.mes
LEFT JOIN visitas v                ON c.mes = v.mes
LEFT JOIN nuevos_ingresos_depa i   ON c.mes = i.mes
LEFT JOIN nuevos_ingresos_cochera h ON c.mes = h.mes
WHERE c.mes >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 day'
  AND c.mes < CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY c.mes DESC;
